creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
im having build failures this morning with 13.3-RELEASE-p6/amd64:

...
     Running `CARGO=/usr/local/bin/cargo CARGO_CRATE_NAME=v8 CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/deno-1.46.2/cargo-crates/v8-0.105.0 CARGO_PKG_AUTHORS='the Deno authors' CARGO_PKG_DESCRIPTION='Rust bindings to V8' CARGO_PKG_HOMEPAGE='' CARGO_PKG_LICENSE=MIT CARGO_PKG_LICENSE_FILE='' CARGO_PKG_NAME=v8 CARGO_PKG_README=README.md CARGO_PKG_REPOSITORY='https://github.com/denoland/rusty_v8' CARGO_PKG_RUST_VERSION='' CARGO_PKG_VERSION=0.105.0 CARGO_PKG_VERSION_MAJOR=0 CARGO_PKG_VERSION_MINOR=105 CARGO_PKG_VERSION_PATCH=0 CARGO_PKG_VERSION_PRE='' GN_OUT_DIR=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/gn_out LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps OUT_DIR=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/build/v8-20301fe10f0b3f19/out RUSTY_V8_SRC_BINDING_PATH=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/gn_out/src_binding.rs /usr/local/bin/rustc --crate-name v8 --edition=2021 /usr/ports/www/deno/work/deno-1.46.2/cargo-crates/v8-0.105.0/src/lib.rs --error-format=json --json=diagnostic-rendered-ansi,artifacts,future-incompat --crate-type lib --emit=dep-info,metadata,link -C opt-level=3 -C embed-bitcode=no --cfg 'feature="use_custom_libcxx"' --check-cfg 'cfg(docsrs)' --check-cfg 'cfg(feature, values("default", "use_custom_libcxx"))' -C metadata=12e44d50303938e8 -C extra-filename=-12e44d50303938e8 --out-dir /usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps -C linker=/usr/local/llvm17/bin/clang -C strip=debuginfo -L dependency=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps --extern bitflags=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps/libbitflags-7bff93976fac160e.rmeta --extern once_cell=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps/libonce_cell-a2e348e99a01f0f0.rmeta --extern paste=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/deps/libpaste-d40c1e4b74916f0b.so --cap-lints warn -L native=/usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/gn_out/obj/ -l static=rusty_v8 -l dylib=c++`
error[E0425]: cannot find value `v8__Uint8Array__kMaxLength` in module `crate::binding`
   --> /usr/ports/www/deno/work/deno-1.46.2/cargo-crates/v8-0.105.0/src/typed_array.rs:50:55
    |
50  |         pub const MAX_LENGTH: usize = crate::binding::[< v8__ $name __kMaxLength >];
    |                                                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ help: a constant with a similar name exists: `v8__String__kMaxLength`
...
56  | typed_array!(Uint8Array);
    | ------------------------ in this macro invocation
    |
   ::: /usr/ports/www/deno/work/target/release/gn_out/src_binding.rs:567:1
    |
567 | pub const v8__String__kMaxLength: ::std::os::raw::c_int = 536870888;
    | -------------------------------------------------------------------- similarly named constant `v8__String__kMaxLength` defined here
    |
    = note: this error originates in the macro `typed_array` (in Nightly builds, run with -Z macro-backtrace for more info)
